parameters.label: Entra administrator
parameters.remediation: Configure an azuread_administrator block on azurerm_mssql_server and set azuread_authentication_only = true.

parameters.label: Server Id
parameters.remediation: Create an azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy resource linked through server_id.

parameters.label: Server Name
parameters.remediation: Create an azurerm_mssql_server_security_alert_policy with state = "Enabled" for the SQL logical server.

controls.title: Azure SQL servers must use Microsoft Entra authentication
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must configure a Microsoft Entra administrator so database access can be governed through centralized identity.
controls.remediation: Configure an azuread_administrator block on azurerm_mssql_server.

controls.title: Azure SQL servers must enable Microsoft Entra-only authentication
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must disable local SQL authentication and allow only Microsoft Entra users and administrators to sign in.

controls.title: Azure SQL servers must enable auditing
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must have an extended auditing policy so database activity is captured for investigation and compliance review.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy resource linked through server_id.

controls.title: Azure SQL servers must enable Microsoft Defender
controls.description: Azure SQL logical servers must enable Microsoft Defender threat detection through a server security alert policy.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_mssql_server_security_alert_policy with state = "Enabled" for the SQL logical server.
